changes.reason: P0 website feedback AC-20260712-C53A2AF6 asks about iPhone System Data using too much storage; existing canonicals cover Mac System Data and iCloud backup/storage, but not iPhone/iPad System Data boundaries and safe cleanup sequence.

queries: iPhone 显示系统数据占据了很多空间
系统数据 其他 储存空间 iPhone
canonicalReview.notes: Mac System Data is device/platform-specific and iCloud storage covers cloud quota, while this feedback asks about local iPhone System Data/Other storage. Existing iPhone articles mention storage only as a branch, so a new canonical avoids conflating iCloud, Mac APFS snapshots, and local iOS cache/system-data boundaries.
